infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow DigitalDance to use your camera to record dance videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow DigitalDance to use your microphone to record sound with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow DigitalDance to access your photo library to upload videos and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow DigitalDance to use your location to show auditions near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow DigitalDance to access your photo library to upload videos and profile pictures.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow DigitalDance to use your camera to record dance videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow DigitalDance to use your microphone to record sound with your videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow DigitalDance to use your location to show auditions near you.
